title: Craft Disabler
description: An plugin that can block any craft you want.
body:
# Craft Disabler

**Take Control of Your Server's Recipes! 🛠️**
Are you tired of specific items being crafted on your server? Do you want to restrict powerful gear or unwanted decorative blocks? **Craft Disabler** is the perfect solution for you! 🚫

This lightweight and easy-to-use plugin allows you to completely disable any crafting recipe simply by listing the item in a single configuration file. Whether it's an Elytra or just a simple Iron Sword, you have full control. 📜

## Key Features

- **Universal Support:** Built with XSeries, Craft Disabler supports all major Minecraft versions from 1.8 to 1.21+ without needing multiple files. It handles both old and new item IDs automatically! ✨

- **Simple Configuration:** Easily add or remove items from the config.yml list.

- **Instant Reload:** Use the /craftreload command to instantly apply your changes without restarting the server. 🔄

- **Permission-Based Command:** The reload command is protected by a configurable permission (craftdisabler.reload), ensuring only authorized staff can use it. 👮

Simply drag and drop the .jar file into your plugins folder, and start building your custom crafting experience! 🚀

✨ **Check Out Our Other Plugins!** ✨ If you enjoy the **CraftDisabler** plugin, don't forget to check out our other high-quality plugins for your server!

- **BuildByBit:** https://builtbybit.com/creators/fisfiskoray.600970
- **PolyMart:** https://polymart.org/user/57522/fisfiskoray
- **Modrinth:** https://modrinth.com/user/FisFisKoray
